---
title: "Arthur Henry Dyke Acland Troyte"
---

## Arthur Henry Dyke Acland Troyte

**Dates:** (1811-1857)

### Description

devotional writer

### Biography

Father of Frances and Joanna Acland Troyte and four other daughters,  brother of Sir Thomas Dyke Acland, 11th Bt. (1809–1898).  He changed his surname to Acland Troyte.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
